errors.checkpoint_timeout: Timed out when attempting to restore checkpoint.
errors.git_not_installed: Git is required for the checkpoints feature. Please install Git to enable checkpoints.

errors.list_api_config: Failed to get list api configuration
errors.hmr_not_running: The local webview dev server is not running, so HMR will not work. Start it before launching the extension, for example with 'pnpm --filter @njust-ai/vscode-webview dev'.

errors.failed_delete_repo: Failed to delete associated shadow repository or branch: {{error}}
errors.custom_storage_path_unusable: Custom storage path "{{path}}" is unusable, will use default path
errors.mistake_limit_guidance: This may indicate a failure in the model's thought process or inability to use a tool properly, which can be mitigated with some user guidance (e.g. "Try breaking down the task into smaller steps").
errors.violated_organization_allowlist: Failed to run task: the current profile isn't compatible with your organization settings
errors.condense_not_enough_messages: Not enough messages to condense context
errors.condensed_recently: Context was condensed recently; skipping this attempt
errors.condense_handler_invalid: API handler for condensing context is invalid
errors.url_timeout: The website took too long to load (timeout). This could be due to a slow connection, heavy website, or the site being temporarily unavailable. You can try again later or check if the URL is correct.
errors.url_not_found: The website address could not be found. Please check if the URL is correct and try again.
errors.no_internet: No internet connection. Please check your network connection and try again.
errors.url_forbidden: Access to this website is forbidden. The site may block automated access or require authentication.
errors.url_page_not_found: The page was not found. Please check if the URL is correct.
errors.url_request_aborted: The request to fetch the URL was aborted. This may happen if the site blocks automated access, requires authentication, or if there's a network issue. Please try again or check if the URL is accessible in a regular browser.
errors.command_timeout: Command execution timed out after {{seconds}} seconds
errors.share_task_failed: Failed to share task. Please try again.
errors.share_auth_required: Authentication required. Please sign in to share tasks.
errors.share_not_enabled: Task sharing is not enabled for this organization.
errors.share_task_not_found: Task not found or access denied.
errors.delete_rules_folder_failed: Failed to delete rules folder: {{rulesFolderPath}}. Error: {{error}}
errors.no_workspace_for_project_command: No workspace folder found for project command

description: "Brief description of what this command does"
---

This is a new slash command. Edit this file to customize the command behavior.
